mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_addresses (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detail}, #{isDefault})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_addresses WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_addresses SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_addresses SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
